# CyberSkill Design System

> Vietnamese-first, globally-scoped design system. Single-file doctrine: DESIGN.md is the only source of truth (22 Parts). Anchors are immutable: Umber #45210E, Ochre #F4BA17, slogan "Turn Your Will Into Real", voice = warm/direct/honest/respectful, APCA floor Lc >= 75 body text.

## Canonical files

- [DESIGN.md](DESIGN.md): the single source of truth — foundations, design language, components (3a-3h), surfaces, accessibility, AI-native patterns, engineering, governance, measurement, enterprise parts 11-22 (Liquid Glass, 50 Style Packs)
- [README.md](README.md): operating manual — change protocol, RFC process, versioning, distribution, roles
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Keep a Changelog + SemVer history

## For agents

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): change paths, verify and audit gates
- [llms.txt](llms.txt): this file
- Machine surfaces: packages/tokens (DTCG tokens + build), packages/react (6 components + specs JSON), packages/style-packs (50 CSS-only skins + verifier), packages/mcp-tokens and packages/mcp-components (prototype MCP servers)
- Audit: `npm run audit` scores the repo against the open-source CyberSkill Design System Audit Framework (125 criteria); the committed baseline lives at docs/audit-baseline.json and regressions fail CI

## Hard rules for generated changes

- Never redefine the anchor tokens (--cs-color-brand-umber, --cs-color-brand-ochre)
- Never remove focus outlines; .cs-button min-height stays >= 44px
- Substantive DESIGN.md changes require an RFC; editorial fixes are PATCH releases
- Run `npm run verify:all` before proposing any change
